seo_description: Current time in Cincinnati, Ohio. Eastern Time Zone — EST (UTC-5) in winter, EDT (UTC-4) during DST. Live clock and time differences for Cincinnati, OH.

faq.question: What time is it in Cincinnati right now?
faq.answer: Cincinnati, Ohio, USA uses Eastern Standard Time (EST, UTC-5) in winter and Eastern Daylight Time (EDT, UTC-4) during Daylight Saving Time. The IANA identifier is America/New_York. Cincinnati is on the same time as New York, Cleveland, and Detroit — 1 hour ahead of Chicago and 3 hours ahead of Los Angeles. The live clock above shows the current Cincinnati time.

faq.question: What time zone is Cincinnati in?
faq.answer: Cincinnati, Ohio is in the Eastern Time Zone (ET). It uses Eastern Standard Time (EST, UTC-5) from the first Sunday in November to the second Sunday in March, and Eastern Daylight Time (EDT, UTC-4) during Daylight Saving Time. The IANA identifier is America/New_York. Note: although Cincinnati is near the Indiana border, it is on Eastern Time — as is most of Ohio.

faq.question: Does Cincinnati observe daylight saving time?
faq.answer: Yes. Cincinnati, Ohio observes Daylight Saving Time. Clocks spring forward 1 hour on the second Sunday in March at 2:00 AM (EST → EDT) and fall back on the first Sunday in November. Ohio follows the standard US DST schedule.

faq.question: What is the time difference between Cincinnati and Chicago?
faq.answer: Cincinnati (EST/EDT, Eastern Time) is always 1 hour ahead of Chicago (CST/CDT, Central Time). Both cities observe DST on the same schedule, keeping the gap constant year-round. When it is 9:00 AM in Chicago, it is 10:00 AM in Cincinnati.

faq.question: Is Cincinnati in the same time zone as Louisville?
faq.answer: Yes. Cincinnati, Ohio and Louisville, Kentucky are both in the Eastern Time Zone (IANA: America/New_York). They are approximately 100 miles apart and always share the same time — EST (UTC-5) in winter and EDT (UTC-4) during Daylight Saving Time.

faq.question: What are typical business hours in Cincinnati?
faq.answer: Standard business hours in Cincinnati are 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM ET, Monday through Friday. Cincinnati is a major Midwestern corporate hub. Major employers include Procter & Gamble (global headquarters), Fifth Third Bank, Kroger, Macy's, and Cincinnati Children's Hospital. The city has a strong consumer goods and financial services sector. The Cincinnati Art Museum and Over-the-Rhine entertainment district offer cultural and dining options on evenings and weekends.
